overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic dystopian city at sunset. The player moves from an urban street with a burning vehicle, past the 'WILD BLUE' mega-skyscraper, and into an open wasteland area with a large geometric dome and roller coaster in the distance. The scene features warm golden hour lighting mixed with neon signs and atmospheric smoke.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with burning vehicle

events.description: moving from intersection onto sidewalk promenade alongside the road
passing a burning vehicle emitting thick smoke on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk approaching and passing a burning vehicle

notable_agents.action: burning car with flames and smoke on the roadside

entered.detail: tall traffic light pole with red signal visible
street sign reading 'Pacific Blvd' mounted on pole
tall curved building with large digital billboard displaying a face
large metal framework dome structure visible in the distance
car on fire with orange flames and rising smoke
elevated highway or monorail track crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city intersection during golden hour, with the camera walking forward along a paved street. A burning vehicle sits on the left side emitting smoke, while modern office towers rise in the background. The geometric dome of a stadium is visible in the far distance, and palm trees line the right side of the street.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering mega skyscraper facade
entering the shadow cast by the massive WILD BLUE building

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the towering mega structure with neon signage and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with prominent green 'WILD BLUE' neon signage
massive futuristic skyscraper with holographic advertisements and industrial scaffolding
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the burning vehicle and approaches the WILD BLUE commercial building, then tilts upward to reveal a massive mega-skyscraper towering overhead. The sun sets behind the buildings creating a warm backlit silhouette. Holographic advertisements and neon signs illuminate the building facades as the geometric dome structure shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone under overpass approaching wasteland

events.description: ground surface transitions from asphalt pavement to dirt and gravel
passing under the concrete overpass structure into open area

agents.ego_description: walking through transitional area from urban street to open wasteland with overgrown vegetation

entered.detail: concrete elevated highway passing overhead with support columns
unpaved ground with patches of dry grass and dirt replacing the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Moving past the WILD BLUE building, the camera passes under a concrete overpass as the environment transitions from urban pavement to a dirt wasteland area. The geometric dome structure becomes more prominent in the center view while the mega-skyscraper recedes behind. The ground becomes uneven with patches of grass and gravel.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned amusement park area with dome and roller coaster

events.description: approaching the large geometric dome structure with roller coaster visible in background

agents.ego_description: walking through open dirt field toward the dome structure with the setting sun creating long shadows

entered.detail: amusement park roller coaster structure silhouetted against the sunset
pink neon sign visible on distant building
derelict low-rise structure with broken windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide dirt wasteland with the large geometric dome structure now prominent in the center. A roller coaster track rises in the left background against the setting sun. The camera moves through the open area with scattered palm trees and abandoned structures, approaching the dome as the warm sunset light bathes the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a chaotic urban intersection into a desolate, open wasteland under a setting sun. It begins by walking along a paved street past a burning vehicle and palm trees, with a distant geometric dome visible on the horizon. As the camera approaches the WILD BLUE commercial building, it tilts upward to reveal a massive mega-skyscraper silhouetted against the golden light and glowing neon advertisements. The scene then shifts as the camera passes under a concrete overpass, where the urban pavement transitions into an uneven dirt terrain of gravel and grass. Finally, the environment opens into a wide wasteland, moving past a distant roller coaster track and scattered ruins toward the now prominent geometric dome bathed in warm sunset light.
